
## 2024-06-28 - Explicit Labels Missing in Amber Auth Scaffolds
**Learning:** The default authentication ECR and Slang templates generated by Amber scaffolds are missing explicit `<label>` associations for inputs like email and password, which impacts screen reader accessibility.
**Action:** When creating or modifying scaffolded authentication forms in this framework, ensure `<label for="...">` explicitly matches the `id` of the `<input>` element.
